business_question: Which product categories show the strongest year-over-year sales growth?
business_context: Category managers need to identify fast-growing categories for future inventory planning and marketing investments.

aggregation_logic.YoY Growth %: ((Current Year Sales - Previous Year Sales) / Previous Year Sales) * 100

sql_answer:
WITH yearly_sales AS (
SELECT
p.CATEGORY,
d.YEAR,
SUM(s.NET_UNITS_SOLD) AS SALES
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN DIM_PRODUCT p
ON s.PRODUCT_KEY = p.PRODUCT_KEY
JOIN DIM_DATE d
ON s.DATE_KEY = d.DATE_KEY
GROUP BY p.CATEGORY, d.YEAR
)
SELECT
CATEGORY,
YEAR,
SALES,
LAG(SALES) OVER (
PARTITION BY CATEGORY
ORDER BY YEAR
) AS PREVIOUS_YEAR_SALES,
ROUND(
(SALES -
LAG(SALES) OVER (
PARTITION BY CATEGORY
ORDER BY YEAR
))
* 100.0 /
NULLIF(
LAG(SALES) OVER (
PARTITION BY CATEGORY
ORDER BY YEAR
),0
),
2
) AS YOY_GROWTH_PCT
FROM yearly_sales;
